string.text: "F1RMW4R3 1NST4LL3R" pendrive

A pendrive containing various config files, scripts, and EXEs. Able to instantly update the firmware of a device. 
Seems too good to be true, but has been approved by top "scientists".
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] firmware updates
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
"4DV4NC3D F1RMW4R3 1NST4LL3R" pendrive

A pendrive containing an excessive amount of advanced config files, scripts, and EXEs. Able to instantly update the firmware of a device. 
A direct upgrade to the previous version, and will not do anything without the preceding updates.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced firmware updates
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
"0V3RCL0CK3R" pendrive

A pendrive containing specific software designed to push a device to it's absolute limits. Will force the hardware to work at speeds and capabilities far beyond it's factory settings. 
Upgrading your device with this drive will void the manufacturer's warranty! Though, considering your current lifestyle, I doubt that matters. 
Requires preceding firmware updates!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_orange] overclocking software
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
"MUND4N3" pendrive

A pendrive containing some basic config files, scripts, and EXEs. Designed to reset a device back to it's factory settings. 
How dull...
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[0,250,250,0] factory reset
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
Echo detector Mk.2

This dated anomalous activity detector produces an alarm signal when anomalous particles enter a special chamber as you approach an anomaly. It can also register the presence of artefacts and measure the distance to the nearest one. The distance is indicated by the frequency of the sound the detector emits. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
Has been updated with new firmware to detect slightly more artefacts, slightly more effectively.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] updated firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] moderate electric power consumption
Echo detector Mk.3

This dated anomalous activity detector produces an alarm signal when anomalous particles enter a special chamber as you approach an anomaly. It can also register the presence of artefacts and measure the distance to the nearest one. The distance is indicated by the frequency of the sound the detector emits. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
Has been further updated with advanced firmware to detect every artefact known to science, and more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high electric power consumption
"Reverberate" detector OC

This dated anomalous activity detector produces an alarm signal when anomalous particles enter a special chamber as you approach an anomaly. It can also register the presence of artefacts and measure the distance to the nearest one. The distance is indicated by the frequency of the sound the detector emits. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
In addition to the previous updates, this device has now been overclocked. Will detect every artefact known to science far more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_orange] overclocked
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_purple] VOIDED WARRANTY
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] very high electric power consumption
Bear detector Mk.2

This last generation anomalous activity detector can be used to locate anomalous formations and has a colour diode panel, which not only indicates the direction of artefacts, but also measures the distance to them. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
Has been updated with new firmware to detect every artefact known to science, slightly more effectively.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] updated firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high electric power consumption
Bear detector Mk.3

This last generation anomalous activity detector can be used to locate anomalous formations and has a colour diode panel, which not only indicates the direction of artefacts, but also measures the distance to them. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
Has been further updated with advanced firmware to detect artefacts more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high electric power consumption
"Yampil" detector OC

This last generation anomalous activity detector can be used to locate anomalous formations and has a colour diode panel, which not only indicates the direction of artefacts, but also measures the distance to them. To switch to artefact search mode, open the device's front cover. 
In addition to the previous updates, this device has now been overclocked. Will detect every artefact known to science far more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_orange] overclocked
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_purple] VOIDED WARRANTY
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] very high electric power consumption
Veles detector Mk.2

A next generation scientific detection scanner. Thanks to three modernised detection chambers, the position of artefacts is shown on a special display screen. When closed, the device registers only radiation and anomalies. To switch to artefact search mode, open the front LED display. When in search mode, the detector is capable of locating all artefacts known to science. 
Has been updated with new firmware to detect artefacts slightly more effectively.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] updated firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high electric power consumption
Veles detector Mk.3

A next generation scientific detection scanner. Thanks to three modernised detection chambers, the position of artefacts is shown on a special display screen. When closed, the device registers only radiation and anomalies. To switch to artefact search mode, open the front LED display. When in search mode, the detector is capable of locating all artefacts known to science. 
Has been further updated with advanced firmware to detect artefacts more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] very high electric power consumption
"Cattle God of the Underworld" detector OC

A next generation scientific detection scanner. Thanks to three modernised detection chambers, the position of artefacts is shown on a special display screen. When closed, the device registers only radiation and anomalies. To switch to artefact search mode, open the front LED display. When in search mode, the detector is capable of locating all artefacts known to science. 
In addition to the previous updates, this device has now been overclocked. Will detect artefacts far more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_orange] overclocked
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_purple] VOIDED WARRANTY
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] extreme electric power consumption
Svarog detector Mk.2

A prototype of an expanded functionality anomalous frequency scanner. This device comes with a program used to identify static areas of anomalous activity stored in its database, while retaining the ability to locate artefacts. The position of anomalous areas and artefacts is displayed on a special screen. The artefact search mode, which can be activated by opening the front LED display, has been modified to detect anomalous formations currently unknown to science. 
Has been updated with new firmware to detect artefacts slightly more effectively.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] updated firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high electric power consumption
Svarog detector Mk.3

A prototype of an expanded functionality anomalous frequency scanner. This device comes with a program used to identify static areas of anomalous activity stored in its database, while retaining the ability to locate artefacts. The position of anomalous areas and artefacts is displayed on a special screen. The artefact search mode, which can be activated by opening the front LED display, has been modified to detect anomalous formations currently unknown to science. 
Has been further updated with advanced firmware to detect artefacts more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced firmware
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] very high electric power consumption
"Divine Blacksmith" detector OC

A prototype of an expanded functionality anomalous frequency scanner. This device comes with a program used to identify static areas of anomalous activity stored in its database, while retaining the ability to locate artefacts. The position of anomalous areas and artefacts is displayed on a special screen. The artefact search mode, which can be activated by opening the front LED display, has been modified to detect anomalous formations currently unknown to science. 
In addition to the previous updates, this device has now been overclocked. Will detect artefacts far more effectively!
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_orange] overclocked
 %c[d_blue] • %c[d_purple] VOIDED WARRANTY
